REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-10-2025 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** JONATHAN VAKNIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, HOOTAN ATEFYEKTA. ROBERT SCHOEN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT ISSUED SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 TO COUNSEL HOOTAN ATEFYEKTA, PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD, FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE BY FEB-21-2025 AND MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. THE COURT DENIED MR. VAKNIN'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE FOR 90 DAYS. THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
